meta.note: Single source of truth. Where older artifacts disagree, these tokens govern. Supersedes the olive (#5F8604) system.

positioning.capabilityLine: PPP + Development Advisory for financeable, durable projects
positioning.essence: Land, livelihood, and the common good.
positioning.oneLiner: Virtuous Cycle is a mission-driven development and advisory firm — helping communities grow with integrity by aligning design, investment, and strategy.
positioning.impression: This firm thinks clearly, writes well, and takes my time seriously.

taglines: Development advisory for the common good.
Real Estate with Purpose. Strategy with Soul.
retired.reason: Too soft/precious for the audience; 'place-strengthening' reads clunky.

color.model: One verdant hue, a family of tones. No off-family color. Warmth comes from imagery, not a second swatch.

verdant.use: ANCHOR — identity, accents, kickers, lead bars, fills

moss.use: green TEXT on white (legible), hovers, second-level bars

fill.use: warm house off-white; green-cast, never blue-grey

amber.reason: off-family; warmth now comes from imagery

rules: Accent at most one phrase per heading in Verdant.
For small green text on white, use Moss (#4F7510), not Verdant — contrast.
Never set green text on a green field.
Reversed art and white type only on Pine or Field grounds.
Callouts separate by weight and rule, not by hue: Verdant=Key Finding, Ink=Risk, Moss=Recommendation.

typography.model: Two families. Spectral speaks and reflects; Inter explains.

bodyLeadIn.note: first words of a paragraph only as inline subhead — never mid-sentence emphasis

rules: Print body never below 12px; slides never below 24px.
One reflective italic Spectral line per page maximum.
Labels and kickers are tracked SemiBold caps in Inter.

logo.mark: A woven Celtic love-knot — four loops returning to their source ('the virtuous cycle').

variants.reversed: use mark with CSS filter brightness(0) invert(1) on Pine/Field, or a white asset

logo.color: Verdant #6E9E10 on light; white on Pine/Field.
logo.clearSpace: ≥ x on all sides, where x = the height of one loop of the mark.
misuse: Do not recolor the mark or place it on an off-brand color.
Do not stretch, squash, or rotate.
Do not add gradients, shadows, or a containing box.

motif.name: The ribbon
motif.description: Layered green-family bands flowing and returning — the cycle, abstracted.
motif.placement: Covers and section dividers only. One signature element per page.

traits.Grounded: Open with the concrete — acreage, dates, instruments — before the abstract.
traits.Visionary: Frame today's decision by the value it compounds tomorrow.
traits.Principled: Justice, dignity, stewardship — surfaced where it belongs, never decorative.
traits.Regenerative: Restoration and renewal, not merely sustainability.

voice.tone: Warm, clear, convicted. Authority through economy, not volume.
do: We help communities reimagine what's possible.
The street typology decision is worth $6–17M.
dont: It is worth noting that value may be created.

phases.name: Root
phases.desc: Begin in the place; surface objectives, constraints, and concrete facts.

phases.name: Align
phases.desc: Reconcile interests; test feasibility against the instruments that exist.

phases.name: Shape
phases.desc: Translate alignment into a structured plan, terms, and value-carrying decisions.

phases.name: Weave
phases.desc: Deliver with the community so the outcome belongs to the place.

phases.name: Return
phases.desc: Steward what was built; let value compound and feed the next turn.

applications.headerStyle: Verdant band (56px): mark + wordmark left, document section right.
documentSkeleton: confidentiality footer with doc code + page

callouts.recommendation: Moss border, light tint (one per section)

ecosystem.plan: One family of marks around a common-life idea; harmonize what is owned, let each keep its own name.

sites.convivium.dev: common life — sits beside 'the common good'
sites.jjacquay.com: the person; flex toward VC olive→verdant + type (owned, harmonize later)
sites.bluffline.org: the place; shares Gulf-Coast palette (not controlled)
